subcodes.first_line: Concerning that which they have mentioned regarding the blessed verse, wherein the person in question hath claimed that the verses have been altered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینکه در باره آیه مبارکه ذکر نمودند که شخص مذکور گفته آیات را تغییر داده‌ اند و
subcodes.subjects: @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
